India. Our author has dealt with this vast science in a single chapter
containing 125 verses, The word VQstu means a dwelling. He
treats of temple-architecture in LVI and of sculpture in LVIII.
It would have been better, had the author put these three chapters
in succession.

I shall now expound for the delight of learned astrologers the
science of house-building which has come down from Brahma
(Creator) through an unbroken succession of sages.
[According to the the celestial architect got a
thorough knowledge of this science from Lord Sambhu. The
of (13th century a.d.) speaks of this lore as the
